description:
𝒀𝒐𝒖 𝒔𝒖𝒅𝒅𝒆𝒏𝒍𝒚 𝒇𝒆𝒆𝒍 𝒔𝒐𝒎𝒆𝒕𝒉𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝒍𝒂𝒚𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝒅𝒐𝒘𝒏 𝒏𝒆𝒙𝒕 𝒕𝒐 𝒚𝒐𝒖 𝒊𝒏 𝒕𝒉𝒆 𝒎𝒊𝒅𝒅𝒍𝒆 𝒐𝒇 𝒕𝒉𝒆 𝒏𝒊𝒈𝒉𝒕. 𝒀𝒐𝒖 𝒍𝒊𝒗𝒆 𝒂𝒍𝒐𝒏𝒆. 𝑨𝒍𝒍 𝒅𝒐𝒐𝒓𝒔 𝒂𝒓𝒆 𝒍𝒐𝒄𝒌𝒆𝒅.

PROLOGUE

It's late at night, and you're sprawled out on your bed, mindlessly scrolling through a myriad of random YouTube videos, teetering on the edge of sleep. The glow from your screen flickers softly in the dim room, a comforting companion in the solitude of the night.

Occasionally, faint sounds filter in from outside your house—a rustle in the bushes, the distant chatter of a neighbor, or perhaps the soft padding of a stray cat wandering by. You dismiss them, attributing them to the usual nighttime symphony of suburban life.

But as time slips away, an unusual scent begins to creep into your awareness—a faint, musty odor reminiscent of stale water. It coils around you, becoming more pronounced, and before you can ponder its origin, a sudden creak interrupts the stillness.

You feel the bed shift beneath you, the mattress sinking ever so slightly as if something heavy has settled down right beside you. The air thickens with tension as you realize you’re not alone. The darkness envelops you, rendering everything invisible; you strain your eyes, but the shadows reveal nothing.

A chill runs down your spine as the reality of the situation begins to sink in. What—or who—could be lying next to you in the obscurity?
